description: Make every birthday unforgettable with our vibrant, 3.5-inch Birthday Badge ‚Äì the perfect accessory to mark the big day! With bold, eye-catching colors and fun design, this badge will instantly let everyone know who the birthday VIP is. Made from high-quality, durable materials, this badge is designed to be lightweight yet sturdy, so it stays looking great all day (and night!) long. Key Features:Perfect Size: At 3.5 inches in diameter, this badge is large enough to be noticed but comfortable to wear.Premium Quality: Crafted from durable, high-grade plastic with a secure metal backing and pin, ensuring it stays securely in place.Vibrant Design: Features bright colors and fun graphics that pop, making it suitable for all ages and genders.Versatile Use: Great for birthdays of all ages ‚Äì from toddlers to adults, this badge adds festive flair to any celebration.Easy to Pin: The secure metal clasp makes it easy to attach to clothing, bags, or even party decorations.
